generated_assessment.reasoning: Despite very high Openness and Extraversion, extremely low Agreeableness-Trust (18th pct) and low Compliance/Modesty generate strong skepticism toward mainstream institutions. Moderate Conscientiousness does little to counteract this, but the stable, low-Neuroticism, self-assured profile keeps the distrust from becoming full-on cynical rejection—hence a mild positive rating, reflecting openness to new information sources while still viewing traditional journalism with clear suspicion.
